name: Amazon Sword Plant
description: The Amazon Sword (Echinodorus bleheri) is a classic aquarium plant known for its broad, lush green leaves that can grow up to 20 inches in height. This hardy plant is perfect for beginners and makes an excellent centerpiece or background plant in medium to large aquariums. Amazon Swords develop extensive root systems and prefer nutrient-rich substrate. They can thrive in a wide range of water conditions but do best with moderate lighting and regular fertilization.
short_description: Classic broad-leaved aquarium plant, perfect as a centerpiece or background.

name: Java Moss
description: Java Moss (Taxiphyllum barbieri) is one of the most versatile and hardy aquarium plants available. This moss can attach to rocks, driftwood, or be used as a carpet plant. It grows in small, branching stems covered with tiny green leaves, creating a lush, natural appearance. Java Moss is extremely forgiving, thriving in a wide range of water parameters and lighting conditions. It's perfect for breeding tanks as it provides excellent hiding places for fry and shrimp.
short_description: Versatile, hardy moss that attaches to surfaces or creates natural carpets.
